pr.title: docs: polish plugins README wording
pr.body:
## Summary
- tweak one sentence in  to read a bit more naturally

## Why
This is a tiny documentation polish in a user-facing sentence that describes the plugin ecosystem. It keeps the meaning unchanged while improving the wording slightly.

## Verification
- verified the updated sentence reads: "many more plugins are available in community marketplaces"
pr.author: MackDing
